## LCE Online v1.0.2b

### Additions
- Minecraft Store Update: The default DLCs have been completely removed from the base game. They can now be downloaded through the   improved Minecraft Store which has received several fixes like removing lag while downloading, and the dlc tick showing after finishing installation.
- Enhanced Leaderboards: Added a proper loading screen and improved performance while browsing leaderboards.
- Map Packs & Bundle Packs: Added support for Map Packs and Bundle Packs in the Minecraft Store. More packs will be added over time.
- New Update Screen: Added a new update notification screen, displayed up to three times after an update like in Legacy Console Edition.
